enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message of unwavering support and love, emphasizing the commitment to be there for someone in times of need.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is part of the live concert album Ulgamellam Unathallava, and does not belong to a specific movie.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, a prominent figure in Tamil music.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 15, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song I Will Be There For You encapsulates the theme of unconditional love and support, making it a perfect anthem for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The song's essence lies in its promise to stand by loved ones through thick and thin, making it relatable to many. It serves as a reminder of the bonds that hold us together, regardless of life's challenges.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: I Will Be There For You is a heartwarming melody that beautifully captures the essence of unwavering support and love. With Yuvan Shankar Raja's soulful voice and poignant lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced true companionship. Dive into this enchanting track that promises to tug at your heartstrings and evoke cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: In this world, is it not you? Only your heart, is it not mine? Even if we are separated by distance, we will come together in memories. Let go of loneliness, and let us open the doors to the future.
Even when you are smiling, even when you are crying, like a guiding path, I will join you with music.
I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You
In this starry night, we will bloom like flowers, with hope we will drink together. Remembering you, you will live on, forgetting you will not happen.
I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You
What is night, what is day? Let the music rain down. In the melody, hearts will blend, will blend, will blend.
Even when you are smiling, even when you are crying, like a guiding path, I will join you with music.
I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You I Will Be There For You, I Will Be There For You
